subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who was stirred by the call of his Lord and perceived the fragrance of the garment after being debarred therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی اهتز من ندآء ربه و وجد عرف القمیص بعد الذی منع عنه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action, @justice and wrath of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
